creator: markjdb@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, Sep 01, 2011 at 01:34:33PM -0400, Mikhail T. wrote:
> Currently the port needs no user interaction to build and I'd like to keep it 
> that way. Is it not possible to figure out, whether EAPI is required for the 
> currently-installed Apache? If it is, then the port should determine, whether or 
> not to define EAPI at build-time...
> 
> All of my servers have switched to Apache-2.2 a while ago, so I can not test 
> this myself. But, if you send me the updated patch(es), I'll be glad to commit 
> it. Thanks! Yours,
> 
>     -mi
> 

Hm, I've just noticed that all the Apache 1.3 ports are set to expire
after 9.0-RELEASE comes out. It's probably not worth making this change
at all then. I think this PR can be closed. =)

Thanks,
-Mark
